app.title: JSentinel
app.subtitle: Local privacy and security visibility center

sponsor.note: Static local sponsor placeholder. No SDK, cookies, user ID, fingerprinting, analytics, or network requests.

dashboard.title: What is happening on this PC
dashboard.subtitle: A local-first control center built on local events and demo data until read-only OS backends are implemented.
dashboard.recentEventsDescription: Newest local timeline records, currently mock/demo only.
dashboard.localPromiseDescription: JSentinel is local-first, private by default, and honest about limitations.
dashboard.quickActionsDescription: These shortcuts only navigate to views. They do not execute privileged actions.

principles.title: Data stays on this machine
principles.description: No accounts, no forced cloud, and no telemetry are part of the foundation.

principles.title: Not an antivirus
principles.description: The product shows processes, events, startup, files, and network activity as best-effort local visibility.

principles.title: Windows 10/11 first
principles.description: Windows is the primary v1 platform. Linux support is planned architecturally and may ship as beta later.

principles.title: Dangerous actions are gated
principles.description: The UI will not execute privileged operations directly. Reversible workflows are preferred.

dashboardSummary.sqliteActive: Events are loaded from the local SQLite store through Tauri commands.
dashboardSummary.frontendFallback: Tauri is unavailable, so the UI is showing local frontend mock data only.
dashboardSummary.latestEventDescription: Timestamp is stored locally with the event record.
dashboardSummary.mockNoticeBody: Until real OS backends are implemented, dashboard counts are based on local mock/demo events.

timeline.title: Local event timeline
timeline.subtitle: Search, filter, and inspect local audit-style events. Package 2 still uses mock/demo data only.
timeline.sqliteSource: Loaded from local SQLite. Events are still demo/mock until OS backends are implemented.
timeline.frontendFallback: Tauri is unavailable, so this view uses bundled frontend mock events.
timeline.invokeFallback: The runtime fallback is visible by design.
timeline.detailsDescription: Select an event to inspect its local metadata.
timeline.selectEventDescription: Details appear here without triggering any system action.
timeline.noEventsMatchDescription: Try clearing filters or seeding demo events from Settings.

processes.title: Process visibility
processes.subtitle: Mock-backed process summaries derived from local events. No real process inspection is running.
processes.limitations: Real process inspection will be added in a Windows read-only backend package.
processes.detailsDescription: Details are assembled from mock/local events only.
processes.backendNotice: Real process inspection will be added in the Windows read-only backend package.

network.title: Network activity
network.subtitle: Recent network events from local demo/mock data. No firewall changes or network scan is implemented.
network.limitations: Network control is planned; no firewall changes are implemented yet.
network.rulesDescription: Rules will require explicit policy and confirmation in a future package.

files.title: File activity
files.subtitle: Audit-mode file and locked-file events from mock/local data only.
files.limitations: File monitoring is audit-mode planned; no real file watcher in this package.
files.actionsDescription: These actions are disabled until safe backend design exists.

startup.title: Startup guard
startup.subtitle: Startup event visibility backed by mock/local events. No registry or system startup source is read.
startup.limitations: Startup Guard backend is not implemented yet.
startup.name: Name
startup.actionsDescription: Disabling or restoring startup entries is intentionally unavailable in this package.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Local controls and privacy explanations for the current build.
settings.languageDescription: UI-level language switch. It does not contact a server.
settings.privacyDescription: JSentinel is designed around local-first behavior, no telemetry, no accounts, and no tracking.
settings.sponsorDescription: The banner is static, bundled locally, language-only, and does not use ad SDKs or network requests.
settings.sponsorDetails: It has no cookies, user ID, fingerprinting, analytics, or remote ad loading.
settings.storageDescription: Package 2 uses a local SQLite development path.
settings.releaseDescription: Primary distribution is planned through GitHub Releases with checksums, changelog, limitations, and privacy notes.
settings.releaseDetails: No auto-updater is included in v1 if it would require unclear server or telemetry behavior.
settings.demoDataDescription: Seed local mock events for UI and SQLite validation. This does not read real OS state.
settings.seedDemoEventsFallback: Tauri is unavailable, so the UI is using bundled frontend mock events.

about.description: JSentinel is an open-source local-first visibility and control center for Windows 10/11 and Linux.
about.whatItIs: A local desktop utility for seeing events, processes, files, startup, and network activity as the backend grows.
about.statusDescription: This build is a product UI layer over local mock events.
about.foundation: Foundation and monorepo are in place.
about.eventModel: Local event model and SQLite repository exist.
about.mockData: Timeline and screens use mock/demo data.
about.noBackend: No real OS backend is implemented yet.
about.platformsDescription: Windows 10/11 is first. Linux is planned/beta.
about.linksDescription: Text references only; the app does not fetch remote content.
